calendar.matters:
Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
James McElroy, Esq. for and with the Petitioner Maria Bueno, present as Guardian ad litem for Sarah Latino, a minor Claimant.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
No Attorney's Fees or Costs.
A net balance of $113,911.58
No Attorney's Fees or Costs.
$20,330.27 to be deposit into Blocked Account with Citi Bank, 3296 Sacramento St., San Francisco, CA. 94115, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years, and monthly payments of $801.33 (or more) to be deposited into Sarah Latino's blocked account, until she reaches the age of majority.
Counsel to prepare Orders.

3:49 p.m.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, received in court and signed by Comm. Gargano
